findings.evidence: `Diagram.lean:9` publicly imports `Mathlib.Data.Finset.Powerset`, but `powersetCard` is only used inside the proof of `card_columnSwapNeighbors_le` at lines 370-393; `DifferentialSupportCardinality.lean:7-9` publicly imports big-operator/Finsupp helper modules whose new constants are used in proofs at lines 79-102, not in the public theorem statements.
findings.fix: Make the proof-helper imports non-public/private, keeping public only imports whose constants occur in theorem statements such as `Finset.offDiag`.
findings.issue: Proof-only Mathlib imports are made public, broadening the downstream API/import surface without appearing in exported statement types.

summary: The new mathematical surface is adequate, but the PR re-exports proof-only Mathlib dependencies from public modules.
